title: amigosMC
description: Embark on an epic Minecraft adventure of RPG, Magic and adventure! What else would you really want than this perfect modpack?!
body:
## **_LadsMC_** 🌸


Embark on an **epic** Minecraft adventure with the LadsMC modpack! Discover a world where technology meets magic in a thrilling RPG experience. Build advanced machinery, cast powerful spells, and explore dungeons with exciting quests. Shape your character's destiny, face bosses, and unlock unique abilities. Dive into a blocky universe where every block holds the promise of discovery, **blending tech**, **magic**, **adventure**, and **RPG gameplay** like never before!

Credits to Ad Astra, [Blast](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/blast), Ecologics, Diggus Maximus, Fabric Seasons, End Remastered,m Farmer's delight and it's expansions, Handcrafted, Hexcasting, Lootr, Moponlight, Naturalist, Oreganized, Chisels and bitsm Trinkets,m Travlers backpack, Tempad, Supplemantaries, 

**_HEAVY CREDITS TO TERRARIUM FOR HUGE INSPO FOR DESIGN!!!_**
